bead.title: bead-lifecycle alignment review: spec, dedupe, and conformance: part 2
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Parent bead ddx-ca1c66ee is too broad for one execution pass. This child owns part 2 of 2 of that parent scope.

ROOT CAUSE
PROBLEM
  A 2026-05-09 alignment review of the bead lifecycle (spec TD-031, types.go,
  lifecycle.go, store.go, reconcile.go, plus all CLI/server/agent mutation
  call sites) found the state machine is well-specified but has six concrete
  alignment, duplication, and test-coverage gaps. The implementation funnels
  ~all status writes through transitionLifecycleInPlace + ValidateLifecycleTransition
  (good), but: reconcile-close bypasses ClosureGate without the spec saying so;
  Ready() filters status twice with conflicting answers; the backend conformance
  suite never exercises the transition matrix; "park to proposed" is duplicated
  6x in agent/*.go; claim-Extra key cleanup is duplicated in Reopen + Unclaim.

CURRENT STATE
  - cli/internal/bead/lifecycle.go:97 ValidateLifecycleTransition is the single
    transition gate.
  - cli/internal/bead/store.go:619 transitionLifecycleInPlace is the single
    chokepoint for status writes.
  - cli/internal/bead/reconcile.go:236-242 closes beads via UpdateWithLifecycleStatus
    directly, bypassing the ClosureGate enforced by store.go:1245.
  - cli/internal/bead/store.go:1763 readyFiltered re-filters Status==StatusOpen
    after the lifecycle module already classified the bucket.
  - cli/internal/bead/backend_conformance_test.go:53-166 covers create/update/
    claim/deps/events but no status transitions.
  - 6 "park to proposed" call sites in cli/internal/agent/{execute_bead_loop.go,
    execute_bead_post_review.go, execute_bead_review_terminal.go,
    execute_bead_conflict_recovery.go} duplicate the same boilerplate.
  - Reopen (store.go:1306-1317) and Unclaim (store.go:823-831) maintain
    parallel lists of claim-Extra keys to clear.

PROPOSED FIX
  Decompose into 6 children, executed in dependency order:
  - B1 (doc-only): amend TD-031 to declare reconcile-close vs evidence-close.
  - B2 (code): align reconcile.go with amended TD-031 and add comment at
    store.go:471 noting Create-time status default is the lone exception.
  - B3 (code): drop redundant Status==Open filter at store.go:1763; let
    EvaluateLifecycleQueue be the single source of truth for "ready".
  - B4 (test): extend backend_conformance_test.go with the TD-031 transition
    matrix against both backend_jsonl and axon_backend.
  - B5 (refactor): extract Store.ParkToProposed helper covering the 6 agent
    duplicates.
  - B6 (refactor): consoli
...[truncated]

PROPOSED FIX
Implement only this child acceptance slice:
- cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... green.
- lefthook run pre-commit passes.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads. Preserve every parent non-scope constraint unless this child explicitly narrows it.
bead.acceptance:
1. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... green.
2. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
